In addition following tests shall be conducted : - Uniformity of coating – The coating of any article shall withstand for 1 minute dips in standard copper sulphate solutio n without the formation of an adherent red spot of metallic copper upon the basic metal. - The quality of cadmium/ zinc plating on items with screw threads shall be inspected visually and shall be free from visible defects such as unplated areas, blisters
